DECLARATION OF MARK R. CONRAD IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62922395) FILED BY DEFENDANT DELRAHIM, AZIZ S. DELRAHIM, SHAWN J.
PROOF OF SERVICE RE DEFENDANTS OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62922395) FILED BY DEFENDANT DELRAHIM, AZIZ S. DELRAHIM, SHAWN J.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST'S MOTION LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE AMENDMENT LARGELY REGARDS SUBSTITUTING A SUBSTANTIALLY IDENTICAL FORM GUARANTEE FOR ONE MISTAKENLY ATTACHED TO THE COMPLAINT. DISCRETION TO PERMIT AMENDMENT IS TO BE EXERCISED LIBERALLY (NESTLE V. SANTA MONICA (1972) 6 CAL.3D 920, 939) AND CONDITIONS ARE RARELY JUSTIFIED (ARMENTA EX REL. CITY OF BURBANK V. MUELLER CO. (2006) 142 CAL.APP.4TH 636, 642). IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANTS FAILED TO PROVIDE INFORMATION AS TO THEIR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600 EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Continued To Sep-03-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion Leave To Amend
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST'S Motion Leave To Amend.

Plaintiff's motion for leave to file a first amended complaint is GRANTED. The amendment largely regards substituting a substantially identical form guarantee for one mistakenly attached to the complaint. Discretion to permit amendment is to be exercised liberally (Nestle v. Santa Monica (1972) 6 Cal.3d 920, 939) and conditions are rarely justified (Armenta ex rel. City of Burbank v. Mueller Co. (2006) 142 Cal.App.4th 636, 642). In any event, defendants failed to provide information as to their attorney fees and costs.

Order is signed

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
